title: helianthus × laetiflorus
intro: Helianthus × laetiflorus, also known as the swamp sunflower or woodland sunflower, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial plant that grows in moist to wet environments, and its flowers are often yellow with darker yellow or orange centers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are due to the presence of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The herbal preparations of Helianthus × laetiflorus include tea infusions and tinctures, which are believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function.
